texto: We humans are the only creatures on the planet capable of articulating worlds which are contrary, even in the most minor way, to reality. Every story, I think, begins there. With a dream. A fantasy.
explicacao: Citação de L.M. Halloran sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We humans are the only creatures on the planet capable of articulating worlds which are contrary,…” articula reflexao, writing-process, humans em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
